name: briefing-html-generator
description: Generates an interactive HTML dashboard from structured briefing data (top_priority, todays_focus, incoming, quick_wins, day_summary). Includes action buttons that trigger Jira issue transitions via the Talos MCP API. Configure BASE_URL and ACTION_WORKFLOW_ID.

BASE_URL.description: Talos controller base URL for action button API calls

ACTION_WORKFLOW_ID.description: UUID of the jira-action workflow to trigger when buttons are clicked
